author: lOrm
content: Fixed. lsp.rs availability check replaced with which::which(server_cmd) using the in-process which crate (already in Cargo.toml). No more fork+exec of which(1), no more PATH-hijack class via a shadowed which binary, no more map_or(true, ...) fail-open. Behavior is identical for the user — same error message on missing server, real path lookup otherwise — but cheaper and safer.
